title: Day 03 Reflection
description: Capture how composition and list rendering clicked — these patterns appear in every dashboard you will build this month.

prompts.question: How did extracting TextInput change your LoginForm compared to Day 02? What props does the parent still own?
prompts.guidance: Name value, onChange, errors — who is the single source of truth?

prompts.question: Explain why keys matter using a specific list you rendered today (errors, fields, or features).
prompts.guidance: What key did you choose? What would break with index keys if the list reordered?

prompts.question: Where did you use map, filter, or reduce? Could any of that logic live outside JSX?
prompts.guidance: Interviewers care about readable render functions.

prompts.question: What duplication remains in your codebase after today? What would you extract next?
prompts.guidance: Honest audit — senior engineers always see the next refactor.
